        AND (SELECT MAX(d_date_sk) FROM date_dim WHERE d_year = 2022)
    GROUP BY 
        ws_bill_customer_sk
),
TopCustomers AS (
    SELECT 
        customer.c_customer_id,
        customer.c_first_name,
        customer.c_last_name,
        RankedSales.total_sales,
        RankedSales.order_count
    FROM 
        RankedSales
    JOIN 
        customer ON RankedSales.ws_bill_customer_sk = customer.c_customer_sk
    WHERE 
        RankedSales.sales_rank <= 10
),
SalesAnalysis AS (
    SELECT 
        dc.d_year,
        SUM(ws_ext_sales_price) AS total_web_sales,
        COUNT(DISTINCT ws_order_number) AS total_orders,
        AVG(ws_ext_sales_price) AS avg_order_value
    FROM 
        web_sales
    JOIN 
        date_dim dc ON web_sales.ws_sold_date_sk = dc.d_date_sk
    GROUP BY 
        dc.d_year
)
SELECT 
    ta.c_customer_id,
    ta.c_first_name,
    ta.c_last_name,
    ta.total_sales,
    ta.order_count,
    sa.total_web_sales,
    sa.total_orders,
    sa.avg_order_value
FROM 
    TopCustomers ta
CROSS JOIN 
    SalesAnalysis sa
ORDER BY 
    ta.total_sales DESC;
sql2:
SELECT
    c.c_customer_id,
    c.c_first_name,
    c.c_last_name,
    cust_agg.total_sales,
    cust_agg.order_count,
    sa.total_web_sales,
    sa.total_orders,
    sa.avg_order_value
FROM
    (
        SELECT
            ws_bill_customer_sk,
            SUM(ws_ext_sales_price) AS total_sales,
            COUNT(ws_order_number) AS order_count
        FROM
            web_sales
        JOIN
            (SELECT MAX(d_date_sk) AS max_date_sk FROM date_dim WHERE d_year = 2022) dm
            ON ws_sold_date_sk BETWEEN dm.max_date_sk - 30 AND dm.max_date_sk
        GROUP BY
            ws_bill_customer_sk
    ) cust_agg
JOIN
    customer c ON cust_agg.ws_bill_customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk
CROSS JOIN
    (
        SELECT
            dc.d_year,
            SUM(ws_ext_sales_price) AS total_web_sales,
            COUNT(DISTINCT ws_order_number) AS total_orders,
            AVG(ws_ext_sales_price) AS avg_order_value
        FROM
            web_sales
        JOIN
            date_dim dc ON web_sales.ws_sold_date_sk = dc.d_date_sk
        GROUP BY
            dc.d_year
    ) sa
ORDER BY
    cust_agg.total_sales DESC;

sql1:
WITH sales_summary AS (
    SELECT 
        ws_bill_customer_sk,
        SUM(ws_net_paid) AS total_sales,
        COUNT(DISTINCT ws_order_number) AS total_orders,
        AVG(ws_net_profit) AS avg_net_profit,
        COUNT(DISTINCT ws_web_page_sk) AS unique_pages_viewed
    FROM 
        web_sales
    WHERE 
        ws_sold_date_sk BETWEEN (SELECT MAX(d_date_sk) FROM date_dim WHERE d_year = 2023) - 30 AND (SELECT MAX(d_date_sk) FROM date_dim WHERE d_year = 2023)
    GROUP BY 
        ws_bill_customer_sk
),
customer_details AS (
    SELECT 
        c.c_customer_sk,
        c.c_first_name,
        c.c_last_name,
        cd.cd_gender,
        cd.cd_marital_status,
        COALESCE(s.total_sales, 0) AS total_sales,
        COALESCE(s.total_orders, 0) AS total_orders,
        COALESCE(s.avg_net_profit, 0) AS avg_net_profit,
        COALESCE(s.unique_pages_viewed, 0) AS unique_pages_viewed
    FROM 
        customer c
    LEFT JOIN 
        customer_demographics cd ON c.c_current_cdemo_sk = cd.cd_demo_sk
    LEFT JOIN 
        sales_summary s ON c.c_customer_sk = s.ws_bill_customer_sk
),
sales_ranked AS (
    SELECT 
        *,
        RANK() OVER (ORDER BY total_sales DESC) AS sales_rank
    FROM 
        customer_details
)
SELECT 
    c.c_first_name,
    c.c_last_name,
    c.cd_gender,
    c.cd_marital_status,
    c.total_sales,
    c.total_orders,
    c.avg_net_profit,
    c.unique_pages_viewed,
    c.sales_rank
FROM 
    sales_ranked c
WHERE 
    c.sales_rank <= 10
ORDER BY 
    c.total_sales DESC;
sql2:
SELECT
    c.c_first_name,
    c.c_last_name,
    cd.cd_gender,
    cd.cd_marital_status,
    COALESCE(s.total_sales, 0) AS total_sales,
    COALESCE(s.total_orders, 0) AS total_orders,
    COALESCE(s.avg_net_profit, 0) AS avg_net_profit,
    COALESCE(s.unique_pages_viewed, 0) AS unique_pages_viewed,
    RANK() OVER (ORDER BY COALESCE(s.total_sales, 0) DESC) AS sales_rank
FROM
    customer c
LEFT JOIN
    customer_demographics cd ON c.c_current_cdemo_sk = cd.cd_demo_sk
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
        ws_bill_customer_sk,
        SUM(ws_net_paid) AS total_sales,
        COUNT(DISTINCT ws_order_number) AS total_orders,
        AVG(ws_net_profit) AS avg_net_profit,
        COUNT(DISTINCT ws_web_page_sk) AS unique_pages_viewed
    FROM
        web_sales
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT MAX(d_date_sk) AS max_date_sk
        FROM date_dim
        WHERE d_year = 2023
    ) dm ON ws_sold_date_sk BETWEEN dm.max_date_sk - 30 AND dm.max_date_sk
    GROUP BY
        ws_bill_customer_sk
) s ON c.c_customer_sk = s.ws_bill_customer_sk
QUALIFY RANK() OVER (ORDER BY COALESCE(s.total_sales, 0) DESC) <= 10
ORDER BY
    COALESCE(s.total_sales, 0) DESC;

sql1:
WITH CustomerSales AS (
    SELECT 
        c.c_customer_sk,
        c.c_first_name,
        c.c_last_name,
        SUM(ws.ws_ext_sales_price) AS total_sales,
        COUNT(ws.ws_order_number) AS order_count,
        AVG(ws.ws_net_profit) AS avg_net_profit
    FROM 
        customer c
    JOIN 
        web_sales ws ON c.c_customer_sk = ws.ws_bill_customer_sk
    WHERE 
        ws.ws_sold_date_sk BETWEEN (SELECT MIN(d_date_sk) FROM date_dim WHERE d_year = 2023) 
        AND (SELECT MAX(d_date_sk) FROM date_dim WHERE d_year = 2023)
    GROUP BY 
        c.c_customer_sk, c.c_first_name, c.c_last_name
),
TopCustomers AS (
    SELECT 
        c.c_customer_sk,
        c.c_first_name,
        c.c_last_name,
        cs.total_sales,
        cs.order_count,
        cs.avg_net_profit,
        RANK() OVER (ORDER BY cs.total_sales DESC) AS sales_rank
    FROM 
        CustomerSales cs
    JOIN 
        customer c ON cs.c_customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk
)
SELECT 
    tc.c_first_name,
    tc.c_last_name,
    tc.total_sales,
    tc.order_count,
    tc.avg_net_profit
FROM

WHERE 
    tc.sales_rank <= 10
ORDER BY 
    tc.total_sales DESC;
sql2:
SELECT
    sq.c_first_name,
    sq.c_last_name,
    sq.total_sales,
    sq.order_count,
    sq.avg_net_profit
FROM (
    SELECT
        c.c_first_name,

        SUM(ws.ws_ext_sales_price) AS total_sales,

        AVG(ws.ws_net_profit) AS avg_net_profit,
        RANK() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(ws.ws_ext_sales_price) DESC) AS sales_rank
    FROM

    JOIN
        customer c ON c.c_customer_sk = ws.ws_bill_customer_sk
    JOIN

    sq.sales_rank <= 10
ORDER BY
    sq.total_sales DESC;

sql1:
WITH SalesData AS (
    SELECT 
        ws_bill_customer_sk,
        ws_ship_customer_sk,
        ws_item_sk,
        SUM(ws_quantity) AS total_quantity,
        SUM(ws_net_paid) AS total_net_paid,
        AVG(ws_sales_price) AS avg_sales_price,
        COUNT(DISTINCT ws_order_number) AS total_orders
    FROM web_sales
    WHERE ws_sold_date_sk BETWEEN (SELECT d_date_sk FROM date_dim WHERE d_date = '2023-10-01')
        AND (SELECT d_date_sk FROM date_dim WHERE d_date = '2023-10-31')
    GROUP BY ws_bill_customer_sk, ws_ship_customer_sk, ws_item_sk
),
CustomerData AS (
    SELECT 
        c_customer_sk,
        COUNT(DISTINCT cd_demo_sk) AS total_demos,
        SUM(hd_vehicle_count) AS total_vehicles
    FROM customer
    LEFT JOIN customer_demographics ON c_current_cdemo_sk = cd_demo_sk
    LEFT JOIN household_demographics ON cd_demo_sk = hd_demo_sk
    GROUP BY c_customer_sk
),
FinalData AS (
    SELECT 
        c.c_customer_sk,
        COALESCE(sd.total_quantity, 0) AS total_quantity,
        COALESCE(sd.total_net_paid, 0) AS total_net_paid,
        COALESCE(sd.avg_sales_price, 0) AS avg_sales_price,
        COALESCE(cd.total_demos, 0) AS total_demos,
        COALESCE(cd.total_vehicles, 0) AS total_vehicles
    FROM customer c
    LEFT JOIN SalesData sd ON c.c_customer_sk = sd.ws_bill_customer_sk
    LEFT JOIN CustomerData cd ON c.c_customer_sk = cd.c_customer_sk
)
SELECT 
    f.c_customer_sk,
    f.total_quantity,
    f.total_net_paid,
    f.avg_sales_price,
    f.total_demos,
    f.total_vehicles,
    CASE 
        WHEN f.total_net_paid > 1000 THEN 'High Value Customer'
        WHEN f.total_net_paid BETWEEN 500 AND 1000 THEN 'Medium Value Customer'
        ELSE 'Low Value Customer'
    END AS customer_value_segment
FROM FinalData f
ORDER BY f.total_net_paid DESC
LIMIT 100;
sql2:
SELECT 
    c.c_customer_sk,
    COALESCE(sd.total_quantity, 0) AS total_quantity,
    COALESCE(sd.total_net_paid, 0) AS total_net_paid,
    COALESCE(sd.avg_sales_price, 0) AS avg_sales_price,
    COALESCE(cd.total_demos, 0) AS total_demos,
    COALESCE(cd.total_vehicles, 0) AS total_vehicles,
    CASE 
        WHEN COALESCE(sd.total_net_paid, 0) > 1000 THEN 'High Value Customer'
        WHEN COALESCE(sd.total_net_paid, 0) BETWEEN 500 AND 1000 THEN 'Medium Value Customer'
        ELSE 'Low Value Customer'
    END AS customer_value_segment
FROM customer c
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT 
        ws_bill_customer_sk,
        ws_item_sk,
        SUM(ws_quantity) AS total_quantity,
        SUM(ws_net_paid) AS total_net_paid,
        AVG(ws_sales_price) AS avg_sales_price,
        COUNT(DISTINCT ws_order_number) AS total_orders
    FROM web_sales
    INNER JOIN date_dim d1 ON ws_sold_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk
        AND d1.d_date >= '2023-10-01' AND d1.d_date <= '2023-10-31'
    GROUP BY ws_bill_customer_sk, ws_ship_customer_sk, ws_item_sk
) sd ON c.c_customer_sk = sd.ws_bill_customer_sk
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT 
        c2.c_customer_sk,
        COUNT(DISTINCT cdm.cd_demo_sk) AS total_demos,
        SUM(hd.hd_vehicle_count) AS total_vehicles
    FROM customer c2
    LEFT JOIN customer_demographics cdm ON c2.c_current_cdemo_sk = cdm.cd_demo_sk
    LEFT JOIN household_demographics hd ON cdm.cd_demo_sk = hd.hd_demo_sk
    GROUP BY c2.c_customer_sk
) cd ON c.c_customer_sk = cd.c_customer_sk
ORDER BY total_net_paid DESC
LIMIT 100;

sql1:
WITH CustomerSales AS (
    SELECT
        c.c_customer_sk,
        COUNT(ws.ws_order_number) AS total_orders,
        SUM(ws.ws_net_profit) AS total_profit,
        SUM(ws.ws_sales_price * ws.ws_quantity) AS total_sales,
        AVG(CASE WHEN cd.cd_gender = 'F' THEN ws.ws_sales_price END) AS avg_female_sales,
        AVG(CASE WHEN cd.cd_gender = 'M' THEN ws.ws_sales_price END) AS avg_male_sales
    FROM
        customer c
    JOIN
        web_sales ws ON c.c_customer_sk = ws.ws_bill_customer_sk
    JOIN
        customer_demographics cd ON c.c_current_cdemo_sk = cd.cd_demo_sk
    GROUP BY
        c.c_customer_sk
),
TopCustomers AS (
    SELECT
        c_customer_sk,
        total_orders,
        total_profit,
        total_sales,
        avg_female_sales,
        avg_male_sales,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY total_sales DESC) AS sales_rank
    FROM
        CustomerSales
),
SalesAnalytics AS (
    SELECT
        tc.c_customer_sk,
        tc.total_orders,
        tc.total_profit,
        tc.total_sales,
        tc.avg_female_sales,
        tc.avg_male_sales,
        td.d_year,
        td.d_month_seq,
        td.d_week_seq
    FROM
        TopCustomers tc
    JOIN
        date_dim td ON EXTRACT(YEAR FROM td.d_date) = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM DATE '2002-10-01') 
                   AND EXTRACT(MONTH FROM td.d_date) = EXTRACT(MONTH FROM DATE '2002-10-01')
    WHERE
        tc.sales_rank <= 100
)
SELECT
    sa.c_customer_sk,
    sa.total_orders,
    sa.total_profit,
    sa.total_sales,
    sa.avg_female_sales,
    sa.avg_male_sales,
    sa.d_year,
    sa.d_month_seq,
    sa.d_week_seq,
    RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY sa.d_year ORDER BY sa.total_profit DESC) AS yearly_profit_rank
FROM
    SalesAnalytics sa
ORDER BY
    sa.total_sales DESC
LIMIT 50;
sql2:
SELECT
    sq.c_customer_sk,
    sq.total_orders,
    sq.total_profit,
    sq.total_sales,
    sq.avg_female_sales,
    sq.avg_male_sales,
    sq.d_year,
    sq.d_month_seq,
    sq.d_week_seq,
    RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY sq.d_year ORDER BY sq.total_profit DESC) AS yearly_profit_rank
FROM (
    SELECT
        ranked.c_customer_sk,
        ranked.total_orders,
        ranked.total_profit,
        ranked.total_sales,
        ranked.avg_female_sales,
        ranked.avg_male_sales,
        td.d_year,
        td.d_month_seq,
        td.d_week_seq
    FROM (
        SELECT
            c.c_customer_sk,
            COUNT(ws.ws_order_number) AS total_orders,
            SUM(ws.ws_net_profit) AS total_profit,
            SUM(ws.ws_sales_price * ws.ws_quantity) AS total_sales,
            AVG(CASE WHEN cd.cd_gender = 'F' THEN ws.ws_sales_price END) AS avg_female_sales,
            AVG(CASE WHEN cd.cd_gender = 'M' THEN ws.ws_sales_price END) AS avg_male_sales,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(ws.ws_sales_price * ws.ws_quantity) DESC) AS sales_rank
        FROM
            customer c
        INNER JOIN
            web_sales ws ON c.c_customer_sk = ws.ws_bill_customer_sk
        INNER JOIN
            customer_demographics cd ON c.c_current_cdemo_sk = cd.cd_demo_sk
        GROUP BY
            c.c_customer_sk
    ) ranked
    CROSS JOIN
        date_dim td
    WHERE
        ranked.sales_rank <= 100
        AND td.d_year = 2002
        AND td.d_moy = 10
) sq
ORDER BY
    sq.total_sales DESC
LIMIT 50;

sql1:
WITH AggregatedSales AS (
    SELECT 
        c.c_customer_id,
        SUM(ws.ws_net_paid) AS total_web_sales,
        SUM(cs.cs_net_paid) AS total_catalog_sales,
        SUM(ss.ss_net_paid) AS total_store_sales,
        COUNT(DISTINCT ws.ws_order_number) AS web_order_count,
        COUNT(DISTINCT cs.cs_order_number) AS catalog_order_count,
        COUNT(DISTINCT ss.ss_ticket_number) AS store_order_count,
        cd.cd_gender,
        cd.cd_marital_status,
        cd.cd_education_status
    FROM 
        customer c
    LEFT JOIN 
        web_sales ws ON c.c_customer_sk = ws.ws_bill_customer_sk
    LEFT JOIN 
        catalog_sales cs ON c.c_customer_sk = cs.cs_bill_customer_sk
    LEFT JOIN 
        store_sales ss ON c.c_customer_sk = ss.ss_customer_sk
    JOIN 
        customer_demographics cd ON c.c_current_cdemo_sk = cd.cd_demo_sk
    WHERE 
        c.c_birth_year BETWEEN 1980 AND 1995
    GROUP BY 
        c.c_customer_id, cd.cd_gender, cd.cd_marital_status, cd.cd_education_status
),
RankedSales AS (
    SELECT 
        *,
        RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY cd_gender ORDER BY total_web_sales DESC) AS web_sales_rank,
        RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY cd_gender ORDER BY total_catalog_sales DESC) AS catalog_sales_rank,
        RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY cd_gender ORDER BY total_store_sales DESC) AS store_sales_rank
    FROM 
        AggregatedSales
)
SELECT 
    rs.c_customer_id,
    rs.total_web_sales,
    rs.total_catalog_sales,
    rs.total_store_sales,
    rs.web_order_count,
    rs.catalog_order_count,
    rs.store_order_count,
    rs.cd_gender,
    rs.cd_marital_status,
    rs.cd_education_status
FROM 
    RankedSales rs
WHERE 
    (rs.web_sales_rank <= 10 OR rs.catalog_sales_rank <= 10 OR rs.store_sales_rank <= 10)
ORDER BY 
    rs.total_web_sales DESC, 
    rs.total_catalog_sales DESC,
    rs.total_store_sales DESC;

WITH SalesData AS (
    SELECT 
        ws.ws_item_sk,
        SUM(ws.ws_quantity) AS total_quantity,
        SUM(ws.ws_sales_price) AS total_sales,
        AVG(ws.ws_net_paid) AS avg_net_paid,
        COUNT(ws.ws_order_number) AS total_orders
    FROM 
        web_sales ws
    JOIN 
        date_dim dd ON ws.ws_sold_date_sk = dd.d_date_sk
    WHERE 
        dd.d_year = 2022
    GROUP BY 
        ws.ws_item_sk
),
TopItems AS (
    SELECT 
        i.i_item_id,
        i.i_item_desc,
        sd.total_quantity,
        sd.total_sales,
        sd.avg_net_paid,
        sd.total_orders,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY sd.total_sales DESC) AS rank
    FROM 
        SalesData sd
    JOIN 
        item i ON sd.ws_item_sk = i.i_item_sk
)
SELECT 
    ti.i_item_id,
    ti.i_item_desc,
    ti.total_quantity,
    ti.total_sales,
    ti.avg_net_paid,
    ti.total_orders
FROM 
    TopItems ti
WHERE 
    ti.rank <= 10
ORDER BY 
    ti.total_sales DESC;
sql2:
SELECT
    i.i_item_id,
    i.i_item_desc,
    s.total_quantity,
    s.total_sales,
    s.avg_net_paid,
    s.total_orders
FROM
    item i
JOIN
    (SELECT
         ws.ws_item_sk,
         SUM(ws.ws_quantity) AS total_quantity,
         SUM(ws.ws_sales_price) AS total_sales,
         AVG(ws.ws_net_paid) AS avg_net_paid,
         COUNT(ws.ws_order_number) AS total_orders
     FROM
         web_sales ws
     WHERE
         ws.ws_sold_date_sk IN (SELECT d_date_sk FROM date_dim WHERE d_year = 2022)
     GROUP BY
         ws.ws_item_sk) s
    ON s.ws_item_sk = i.i_item_sk
WHERE
    s.total_sales >= (
        SELECT MIN(top10.total_sales)
        FROM (
            SELECT
                SUM(ws2.ws_sales_price) AS total_sales
            FROM
                web_sales ws2
            WHERE
                ws2.ws_sold_date_sk IN (SELECT d_date_sk FROM date_dim WHERE d_year = 2022)
            GROUP BY
                ws2.ws_item_sk
            ORDER BY
                total_sales DESC
            LIMIT 10
        ) top10
    )
ORDER BY
    s.total_sales DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
WITH sales_data AS (
    SELECT 
        ws_item_sk,
        SUM(ws_sales_price) AS total_sales,
        COUNT(ws_order_number) AS total_orders
    FROM 
        web_sales
    GROUP BY 
        ws_item_sk
),
customer_data AS (
    SELECT 
        c_customer_sk,
        COUNT(DISTINCT cd_demo_sk) AS demo_count,
        AVG(cd_purchase_estimate) AS avg_purchase_estimate
    FROM 
        customer
    JOIN 
        customer_demographics ON c_current_cdemo_sk = cd_demo_sk
    GROUP BY 
        c_customer_sk
)
SELECT 
    sd.ws_item_sk,
    sd.total_sales,
    sd.total_orders,
    cd.demo_count,
    cd.avg_purchase_estimate
FROM 
    sales_data sd
JOIN 
    customer_data cd ON sd.ws_item_sk = cd.c_customer_sk
ORDER BY 
    sd.total_sales DESC
LIMIT 100;
sql2:
SELECT 
    sd.ws_item_sk,
    sd.total_sales,
    sd.total_orders,
    cd.demo_count,
    cd.avg_purchase_estimate
FROM 
    (SELECT 
        ws_item_sk,
        SUM(ws_sales_price) AS total_sales,
        COUNT(ws_order_number) AS total_orders
    FROM 
        web_sales
    GROUP BY 
        ws_item_sk) sd
JOIN 
    (SELECT 
        c_customer_sk,
        COUNT(DISTINCT cd_demo_sk) AS demo_count,
        AVG(cd_purchase_estimate) AS avg_purchase_estimate
    FROM 
        customer
    JOIN 
        customer_demographics ON c_current_cdemo_sk = cd_demo_sk
    GROUP BY 
        c_customer_sk) cd ON sd.ws_item_sk = cd.c_customer_sk
ORDER BY 
    sd.total_sales DESC
LIMIT 100;

    c.c_last_name,
    ca.ca_city,
    SUM(ss.ss_sales_price) AS total_sales,
    COUNT(DISTINCT ss.ss_ticket_number) AS total_transactions
FROM
    customer c
JOIN
    customer_address ca ON c.c_current_addr_sk = ca.ca_address_sk
JOIN
    store_sales ss ON c.c_customer_sk = ss.ss_customer_sk
WHERE
    ca.ca_city = 'Los Angeles'
    AND ss.ss_sold_date_sk BETWEEN 2400 AND 2450
GROUP BY
    c.c_customer_id,
    c.c_first_name,
    c.c_last_name,
    ca.ca_city
ORDER BY
    total_sales DESC
LIMIT 100;
sql2:
WITH la_customers AS (
    SELECT c.c_customer_sk, c.c_customer_id, c.c_first_name, c.c_last_name, ca.ca_city
    FROM customer c
    JOIN customer_address ca ON c.c_current_addr_sk = ca.ca_address_sk
    WHERE ca.ca_city = 'Los Angeles'
),
filtered_sales AS (
    SELECT ss_customer_sk, ss_sales_price, ss_ticket_number
    FROM store_sales
    WHERE ss_sold_date_sk BETWEEN 2400 AND 2450
      AND ss_customer_sk IN (SELECT c_customer_sk FROM la_customers)
)
SELECT
    lc.c_customer_id,
    lc.c_first_name,
    lc.c_last_name,
    lc.ca_city,
    SUM(fs.ss_sales_price) AS total_sales,
    COUNT(DISTINCT fs.ss_ticket_number) AS total_transactions
FROM
    la_customers lc
JOIN
    filtered_sales fs ON lc.c_customer_sk = fs.ss_customer_sk
GROUP BY
    lc.c_customer_id,
    lc.c_first_name,
    lc.c_last_name,
    lc.ca_city
ORDER BY
    total_sales DESC
LIMIT 100;

SELECT 
    c.c_customer_id,
    SUM(ss.ss_sales_price) AS total_sales,
    COUNT(ss.ss_ticket_number) AS total_transactions,
    AVG(ss.ss_sales_price) AS avg_transaction_value
FROM 
    customer c
JOIN 
    store_sales ss ON c.c_customer_sk = ss.ss_customer_sk
JOIN 
    date_dim d ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
WHERE 
    d.d_year = 2023
GROUP BY 
    c.c_customer_id
ORDER BY 
    total_sales DESC
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH customer_sales AS (
    SELECT
        ss.ss_customer_sk,
        SUM(ss.ss_sales_price) AS total_sales,
        COUNT(ss.ss_ticket_number) AS total_transactions,
        AVG(ss.ss_sales_price) AS avg_transaction_value
    FROM
        store_sales ss
    WHERE
        EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 FROM date_dim d
            WHERE d.d_date_sk = ss.ss_sold_date_sk AND d.d_year = 2023
        )
    GROUP BY
        ss.ss_customer_sk
)
SELECT
    c.c_customer_id,
    cs.total_sales,
    cs.total_transactions,
    cs.avg_transaction_value
FROM
    customer c
JOIN
    customer_sales cs ON c.c_customer_sk = cs.ss_customer_sk
ORDER BY
    cs.total_sales DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
SELECT 
    c.c_customer_id,
    SUM(ss.ss_sales_price) AS total_sales,
    COUNT(ss.ss_ticket_number) AS transaction_count,
    d.d_year
FROM 
    customer c
JOIN 
    store_sales ss ON c.c_customer_sk = ss.ss_customer_sk
JOIN 
    date_dim d ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
WHERE 
    d.d_year BETWEEN 2020 AND 2023
GROUP BY 
    c.c_customer_id, d.d_year
ORDER BY 
    total_sales DESC
LIMIT 100;
sql2:
WITH filtered_sales AS (
    SELECT
        ss.ss_customer_sk,
        ss.ss_sales_price,
        ss.ss_ticket_number,
        d.d_year
    FROM
        store_sales ss,
        date_dim d
    WHERE
        ss.ss_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
        AND d.d_year BETWEEN 2020 AND 2023
)
SELECT
    c.c_customer_id,
    SUM(fs.ss_sales_price) AS total_sales,
    COUNT(fs.ss_ticket_number) AS transaction_count,
    fs.d_year
FROM
    customer c
JOIN
    filtered_sales fs ON c.c_customer_sk = fs.ss_customer_sk
GROUP BY
    c.c_customer_id, fs.d_year
ORDER BY
    total_sales DESC
LIMIT 100;

sql1:
SELECT 
    ca_state, 
    COUNT(DISTINCT c_customer_sk) AS customer_count, 
    SUM(ws_net_profit) AS total_net_profit
FROM 
    customer_address AS ca
JOIN 
    customer AS c ON ca.ca_address_sk = c.c_current_addr_sk
JOIN 
    web_sales AS ws ON c.c_customer_sk = ws.ws_bill_customer_sk
GROUP BY 
    ca_state
ORDER BY 
    total_net_profit DESC
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH cust_sales AS (
    SELECT 
        c.c_current_addr_sk,
        c.c_customer_sk,
        ws.ws_net_profit
    FROM 
        customer c
    INNER JOIN 
        web_sales ws ON c.c_customer_sk = ws.ws_bill_customer_sk
)
SELECT 
    ca.ca_state,
    COUNT(DISTINCT cs.c_customer_sk) AS customer_count,
    SUM(cs.ws_net_profit) AS total_net_profit
FROM 
    customer_address ca
INNER JOIN 
    cust_sales cs ON ca.ca_address_sk = cs.c_current_addr_sk
GROUP BY 
    ca.ca_state
ORDER BY 
    total_net_profit DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
SELECT 
    c.c_customer_id, 
    ca.ca_city, 
    ca.ca_state, 
    SUM(ss.ss_sales_price) AS total_sales,
    COUNT(ss.ss_ticket_number) AS total_transactions
FROM 
    customer c
JOIN 
    customer_address ca ON c.c_current_addr_sk = ca.ca_address_sk
JOIN 
    store_sales ss ON c.c_customer_sk = ss.ss_customer_sk
WHERE 
    ca.ca_state = 'CA' 
    AND ss.ss_sold_date_sk BETWEEN 2450000 AND 2450600 
GROUP BY 
    c.c_customer_id, 
    ca.ca_city, 
    ca.ca_state
ORDER BY 
    total_sales DESC
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH ca_filtered AS (
    SELECT ca_address_sk, ca_city, ca_state
    FROM customer_address
    WHERE ca_state = 'CA'
),
ss_filtered AS (
    SELECT ss_customer_sk, ss_sales_price, ss_ticket_number
    FROM store_sales
    WHERE ss_sold_date_sk BETWEEN 2450000 AND 2450600
),
customer_sales AS (
    SELECT
        c.c_customer_id,
        cf.ca_city,
        cf.ca_state,
        sf.ss_sales_price,
        sf.ss_ticket_number
    FROM customer c
    INNER JOIN ca_filtered cf ON c.c_current_addr_sk = cf.ca_address_sk
    INNER JOIN ss_filtered sf ON c.c_customer_sk = sf.ss_customer_sk
)
SELECT
    c_customer_id,
    ca_city,
    ca_state,
    SUM(ss_sales_price) AS total_sales,
    COUNT(ss_ticket_number) AS total_transactions
FROM customer_sales
GROUP BY c_customer_id, ca_city, ca_state
ORDER BY total_sales DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
SELECT
    c.c_first_name,
    c.c_last_name,
    c.c_email_address,
    d.d_date,
    SUM(ws.ws_sales_price) AS total_sales
FROM
    customer c
JOIN
    web_sales ws ON c.c_customer_sk = ws.ws_bill_customer_sk
JOIN
    date_dim d ON ws.ws_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
WHERE
    d.d_year = 2023
GROUP BY
    c.c_first_name,
    c.c_last_name,
    c.c_email_address,
    d.d_date
ORDER BY
    total_sales DESC
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH daily_web_sales AS (
    SELECT
        ws.ws_bill_customer_sk,
        ws.ws_sold_date_sk,
        SUM(ws.ws_sales_price) AS total_sales
    FROM
        web_sales ws
    WHERE
        ws.ws_sold_date_sk IN (SELECT d_date_sk FROM date_dim WHERE d_year = 2023)
    GROUP BY
        ws.ws_bill_customer_sk,
        ws.ws_sold_date_sk
)
SELECT
    c.c_first_name,
    c.c_last_name,
    c.c_email_address,
    d.d_date,
    dws.total_sales
FROM
    daily_web_sales dws
JOIN
    customer c ON c.c_customer_sk = dws.ws_bill_customer_sk
JOIN
    date_dim d ON dws.ws_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
ORDER BY
    total_sales DESC
LIMIT 10;

SELECT 
    ca_city, 
    COUNT(DISTINCT c_customer_sk) AS customer_count, 
    SUM(ws_sales_price) AS total_sales 
FROM 
    customer_address ca 
JOIN 
    customer c ON ca.ca_address_sk = c.c_current_addr_sk 
JOIN 
    web_sales ws ON c.c_customer_sk = ws.ws_bill_customer_sk 
GROUP BY

ORDER BY

LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH city_sales AS (
    SELECT
        ca.ca_city,
        ws.ws_bill_customer_sk AS c_customer_sk,
        ws.ws_sales_price
    FROM
        web_sales ws,
        customer c,
        customer_address ca
    WHERE
        ws.ws_bill_customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk
        AND c.c_current_addr_sk = ca.ca_address_sk
)
SELECT
    ca_city,
    COUNT(DISTINCT c_customer_sk) AS customer_count,
    SUM(ws_sales_price) AS total_sales
FROM
    city_sales
GROUP BY
    ca_city
ORDER BY
    total_sales DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
SELECT 
    c.c_customer_id, 
    ca.ca_city, 
    COUNT(ss.ss_ticket_number) AS total_sales, 
    SUM(ss.ss_net_paid) AS total_revenue
FROM 
    customer c
JOIN 
    customer_address ca ON c.c_current_addr_sk = ca.ca_address_sk
JOIN 
    store_sales ss ON c.c_customer_sk = ss.ss_customer_sk
WHERE 
    ca.ca_state = 'CA'
GROUP BY 
    c.c_customer_id, 
    ca.ca_city
ORDER BY 
    total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 100;
sql2:
WITH ca_customers AS (
    SELECT c.c_customer_sk, c.c_customer_id, ca.ca_city
    FROM customer c, customer_address ca
    WHERE c.c_current_addr_sk = ca.ca_address_sk
      AND ca.ca_state = 'CA'
)
SELECT 
    cc.c_customer_id,
    cc.ca_city,
    COUNT(ss.ss_ticket_number) AS total_sales,
    SUM(ss.ss_net_paid) AS total_revenue
FROM 
    ca_customers cc
JOIN 
    store_sales ss ON cc.c_customer_sk = ss.ss_customer_sk
GROUP BY 
    cc.c_customer_id, 
    cc.ca_city
ORDER BY 
    total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 100;

sql1:
SELECT c.c_customer_id, 
       SUM(ss.ss_sales_price) AS total_sales, 
       COUNT(DISTINCT ss.ss_ticket_number) AS total_transactions, 
       MAX(d.d_date) AS last_purchase_date 
FROM customer c 
JOIN store_sales ss ON c.c_customer_sk = ss.ss_customer_sk 
JOIN date_dim d ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk 
WHERE d.d_year = 2023 
GROUP BY c.c_customer_id 
ORDER BY total_sales DESC 
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH sales_2023 AS (
    SELECT ss.ss_customer_sk,
           SUM(ss.ss_sales_price) AS total_sales,
           COUNT(DISTINCT ss.ss_ticket_number) AS total_transactions,
           MAX(d.d_date) AS last_purchase_date
    FROM store_sales ss,
         date_dim d
    WHERE ss.ss_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
      AND d.d_year = 2023
    GROUP BY ss.ss_customer_sk
)
SELECT c.c_customer_id,
       s.total_sales,
       s.total_transactions,
       s.last_purchase_date
FROM sales_2023 s
JOIN customer c ON c.c_customer_sk = s.ss_customer_sk
ORDER BY s.total_sales DESC
LIMIT 10;

        ss.ss_customer_sk,
        SUM(ss.ss_quantity) AS total_quantity,
        SUM(ss.ss_net_paid) AS total_sales
    FROM
        store_sales ss
    WHERE
        EXISTS (
            SELECT 1
            FROM date_dim d
            WHERE d.d_date_sk = ss.ss_sold_date_sk
              AND d.d_year = 2023
        )
    GROUP BY
        ss.ss_customer_sk
)
SELECT
    c.c_first_name,
    c.c_last_name,
    s.total_quantity,
    s.total_sales
FROM
    customer c
JOIN
    sales_2023 s ON c.c_customer_sk = s.ss_customer_sk
ORDER BY
    total_sales DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
WITH SalesData AS (
    SELECT 
        ws_item_sk,
        SUM(ws_sales_price) AS total_sales_price,
        SUM(ws_quantity) AS total_quantity
    FROM 
        web_sales
    WHERE 
        ws_sold_date_sk BETWEEN 1000 AND 2000
    GROUP BY 
        ws_item_sk
),
ItemData AS (
    SELECT 
        i_item_sk,
        i_product_name,
        i_category
    FROM 
        item
)
SELECT 
    id.i_product_name,
    SUM(sd.total_sales_price) AS total_revenue,
    SUM(sd.total_quantity) AS total_units_sold
FROM 
    SalesData sd
JOIN 
    ItemData id ON sd.ws_item_sk = id.i_item_sk
GROUP BY 
    id.i_product_name
ORDER BY 
    total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
SELECT
    i.i_product_name,
    SUM(ws.ws_sales_price) AS total_revenue,
    SUM(ws.ws_quantity)     AS total_units_sold
FROM
    web_sales ws
JOIN
    item i ON ws.ws_item_sk = i.i_item_sk
WHERE
    ws.ws_sold_date_sk BETWEEN 1000 AND 2000
GROUP BY
    i.i_product_name
ORDER BY
    total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10

sql1:
SELECT 
    ca_state, 
    COUNT(DISTINCT c_customer_sk) AS unique_customers, 
    SUM(ss_net_profit) AS total_net_profit
FROM 
    customer_address 
JOIN 
    customer ON customer.c_current_addr_sk = customer_address.ca_address_sk 
JOIN 
    store_sales ON store_sales.ss_customer_sk = customer.c_customer_sk 
JOIN 
    date_dim ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk 
WHERE 
    date_dim.d_year = 2023 
GROUP BY 
    ca_state 
ORDER BY 
    total_net_profit DESC 
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH sales_2023 AS (
    SELECT ss_customer_sk, ss_net_profit
    FROM store_sales
    WHERE ss_sold_date_sk IN (
        SELECT d_date_sk FROM date_dim WHERE d_year = 2023
    )
)
SELECT
    ca.ca_state,
    COUNT(DISTINCT c.c_customer_sk) AS unique_customers,
    SUM(s.ss_net_profit) AS total_net_profit
FROM
    sales_2023 s
    JOIN customer c ON c.c_customer_sk = s.ss_customer_sk
    JOIN customer_address ca ON ca.ca_address_sk = c.c_current_addr_sk
GROUP BY
    ca.ca_state
ORDER BY
    total_net_profit DESC
LIMIT 10;

    SELECT c_customer_sk, c_customer_id
    FROM customer
    WHERE c_birth_year BETWEEN 1970 AND 1990
),
sales_agg AS (
    SELECT ss_customer_sk,
           SUM(ss_sales_price) AS total_sales,
           COUNT(ss_ticket_number) AS total_transactions
    FROM store_sales
    WHERE ss_customer_sk IN (SELECT c_customer_sk FROM eligible_customers)
    GROUP BY ss_customer_sk
)
SELECT ec.c_customer_id,
       sa.total_sales,
       sa.total_transactions
FROM eligible_customers ec
JOIN sales_agg sa ON ec.c_customer_sk = sa.ss_customer_sk
ORDER BY sa.total_sales DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
SELECT 
    c.c_customer_id, 
    SUM(ss.ss_sales_price) AS total_sales, 
    d.d_year
FROM 
    customer c
JOIN 
    store_sales ss ON c.c_customer_sk = ss.ss_customer_sk
JOIN 
    date_dim d ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
WHERE 
    d.d_year BETWEEN 2020 AND 2023
GROUP BY 
    c.c_customer_id, d.d_year
ORDER BY 
    total_sales DESC
LIMIT 100;
sql2:
WITH yearly_sales AS (
    SELECT
        ss.ss_customer_sk,
        ss.ss_sales_price,
        d.d_year
    FROM
        store_sales ss,
        date_dim d
    WHERE
        ss.ss_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
        AND d.d_year BETWEEN 2020 AND 2023
)
SELECT
    c.c_customer_id,
    SUM(ys.ss_sales_price) AS total_sales,
    ys.d_year
FROM
    customer c,
    yearly_sales ys
WHERE
    c.c_customer_sk = ys.ss_customer_sk
GROUP BY
    c.c_customer_id, ys.d_year
ORDER BY
    total_sales DESC
LIMIT 100;

sql1:
SELECT 
    c.c_customer_id,
    SUM(ss.ss_sales_price) AS total_sales,
    COUNT(ss.ss_ticket_number) AS total_transactions,
    AVG(ss.ss_sales_price) AS average_sales
FROM 
    customer c
JOIN 
    store_sales ss ON c.c_customer_sk = ss.ss_customer_sk
WHERE 
    ss.ss_sold_date_sk BETWEEN 1 AND 1000
GROUP BY 
    c.c_customer_id
ORDER BY 
    total_sales DESC
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH customer_agg AS (
    SELECT
        ss_customer_sk,
        SUM(ss_sales_price) AS total_sales,
        COUNT(ss_ticket_number) AS total_transactions,
        AVG(ss_sales_price) AS average_sales
    FROM
        store_sales
    WHERE
        ss_sold_date_sk BETWEEN 1 AND 1000
    GROUP BY
        ss_customer_sk
)
SELECT
    c.c_customer_id,
    ca.total_sales,
    ca.total_transactions,
    ca.average_sales
FROM
    customer_agg ca
JOIN
    customer c ON c.c_customer_sk = ca.ss_customer_sk
ORDER BY
    ca.total_sales DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
SELECT 
    c.c_customer_id, 
    c.c_first_name, 
    c.c_last_name, 
    s.s_store_name, 
    ss.ss_sales_price, 
    ss.ss_quantity, 
    d.d_date 
FROM 
    customer c 
JOIN 
    store_sales ss ON c.c_customer_sk = ss.ss_customer_sk 
JOIN 
    store s ON ss.ss_store_sk = s.s_store_sk 
JOIN 
    date_dim d ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk 
WHERE 
    d.d_year = 2023 
    AND s.s_state = 'CA' 
ORDER BY 
    ss.ss_sales_price DESC 
LIMIT 100;
sql2:
WITH ca_sales AS (
    SELECT ss.ss_customer_sk,
           ss.ss_sales_price,
           ss.ss_quantity,
           d.d_date
    FROM store_sales ss
    JOIN date_dim d ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
    WHERE d.d_year = 2023
      AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM store s WHERE s.s_store_sk = ss.ss_store_sk AND s.s_state = 'CA')
)
SELECT c.c_customer_id,
       c.c_first_name,
       c.c_last_name,
       s.s_store_name,
       ca.ss_sales_price,
       ca.ss_quantity,
       ca.d_date
FROM ca_sales ca
JOIN customer c ON c.c_customer_sk = ca.ss_customer_sk
JOIN store_sales ss2 ON ss2.ss_customer_sk = ca.ss_customer_sk
                     AND ss2.ss_sales_price = ca.ss_sales_price
                     AND ss2.ss_quantity = ca.ss_quantity
JOIN store s ON ss2.ss_store_sk = s.s_store_sk AND s.s_state = 'CA'
JOIN date_dim d2 ON ss2.ss_sold_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk AND d2.d_date = ca.d_date
ORDER BY ca.ss_sales_price DESC
LIMIT 100;

sql1:
SELECT 
    c.c_customer_id,
    c.c_first_name,
    c.c_last_name,
    ca.ca_city,
    SUM(ss.ss_sales_price) AS total_sales,
    COUNT(ss.ss_ticket_number) AS total_transactions
FROM 
    customer c
JOIN 
    customer_address ca ON c.c_current_addr_sk = ca.ca_address_sk
JOIN 
    store_sales ss ON c.c_customer_sk = ss.ss_customer_sk
WHERE 
    ca.ca_state = 'CA'
    AND c.c_birth_year BETWEEN 1970 AND 1990
GROUP BY 
    c.c_customer_id, 
    c.c_first_name, 
    c.c_last_name, 
    ca.ca_city
ORDER BY 
    total_sales DESC
LIMIT 100;
sql2:
WITH ca_filtered AS (
    SELECT ca_address_sk, ca_city
    FROM customer_address
    WHERE ca_state = 'CA'
),
c_filtered AS (
    SELECT c_customer_sk, c_customer_id, c_first_name, c_last_name, c_current_addr_sk
    FROM customer
    WHERE c_birth_year BETWEEN 1970 AND 1990
)
SELECT 
    cf.c_customer_id,
    cf.c_first_name,
    cf.c_last_name,
    caf.ca_city,
    SUM(ss.ss_sales_price) AS total_sales,
    COUNT(ss.ss_ticket_number) AS total_transactions
FROM 
    store_sales ss
JOIN 
    c_filtered cf ON ss.ss_customer_sk = cf.c_customer_sk
JOIN 
    ca_filtered caf ON cf.c_current_addr_sk = caf.ca_address_sk
GROUP BY 
    cf.c_customer_id,
    cf.c_first_name,
    cf.c_last_name,
    caf.ca_city
ORDER BY 
    total_sales DESC
LIMIT 100;

            SELECT 1
            FROM date_dim AS d

sql1:
WITH sales_summary AS (
    SELECT 
        ws_bill_cdemo_sk AS customer_demo_sk,
        SUM(ws_ext_sales_price) AS total_sales,
        COUNT(ws_order_number) AS order_count
    FROM 
        web_sales
    GROUP BY 
        ws_bill_cdemo_sk
)
SELECT 
    cd_gender,
    cd_marital_status,
    COUNT(ss.customer_demo_sk) AS customer_count,
    AVG(ss.total_sales) AS avg_sales,
    SUM(ss.order_count) AS total_orders
FROM 
    sales_summary ss
JOIN 
    customer_demographics cd ON ss.customer_demo_sk = cd.cd_demo_sk
GROUP BY 
    cd_gender, cd_marital_status
ORDER BY 
    avg_sales DESC;
sql2:
SELECT 
    cd_gender,
    cd_marital_status,
    COUNT(ss.customer_demo_sk) AS customer_count,
    AVG(ss.total_sales) AS avg_sales,
    SUM(ss.order_count) AS total_orders
FROM 
    (SELECT 
        ws_bill_cdemo_sk AS customer_demo_sk,
        SUM(ws_ext_sales_price) AS total_sales,
        COUNT(ws_order_number) AS order_count
    FROM 
        web_sales
    GROUP BY 
        ws_bill_cdemo_sk) ss
JOIN 
    customer_demographics cd ON ss.customer_demo_sk = cd.cd_demo_sk
GROUP BY 
    cd_gender, cd_marital_status
ORDER BY 
    avg_sales DESC;

sql1:
SELECT 
    c.c_customer_id,
    SUM(ss.ss_sales_price) AS total_sales,
    COUNT(ss.ss_ticket_number) AS total_transactions,
    AVG(ss.ss_net_paid) AS avg_net_paid,
    COUNT(DISTINCT ss.ss_store_sk) AS unique_stores
FROM 
    customer c
JOIN 
    store_sales ss ON c.c_customer_sk = ss.ss_customer_sk
JOIN 
    date_dim d ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
WHERE 
    d.d_year = 2023
GROUP BY 
    c.c_customer_id
ORDER BY 
    total_sales DESC
LIMIT 100;
sql2:
WITH sales_2023 AS (
    SELECT
        ss.ss_customer_sk,
        SUM(ss.ss_sales_price) AS total_sales,
        COUNT(ss.ss_ticket_number) AS total_transactions,
        AVG(ss.ss_net_paid) AS avg_net_paid,
        COUNT(DISTINCT ss.ss_store_sk) AS unique_stores
    FROM
        store_sales ss
    WHERE
        ss.ss_sold_date_sk IN (SELECT d.d_date_sk FROM date_dim d WHERE d.d_year = 2023)
    GROUP BY
        ss.ss_customer_sk
)
SELECT
    c.c_customer_id,
    s.total_sales,
    s.total_transactions,
    s.avg_net_paid,
    s.unique_stores
FROM
    sales_2023 s
JOIN
    customer c ON c.c_customer_sk = s.ss_customer_sk
ORDER BY
    s.total_sales DESC
LIMIT 100;

sql1:
SELECT c.c_customer_id, SUM(ss.ss_net_profit) AS total_net_profit
FROM customer c
JOIN store_sales ss ON c.c_customer_sk = ss.ss_customer_sk
JOIN date_dim d ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
WHERE d.d_year = 2023
GROUP BY c.c_customer_id
ORDER BY total_net_profit DESC
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH customer_profit AS (
    SELECT ss.ss_customer_sk,
           SUM(ss.ss_net_profit) AS total_net_profit
    FROM store_sales ss
    WHERE ss.ss_sold_date_sk IN (
        SELECT d.d_date_sk FROM date_dim d WHERE d.d_year = 2023
    )
    GROUP BY ss.ss_customer_sk
)
SELECT c.c_customer_id, cp.total_net_profit
FROM customer c
JOIN customer_profit cp ON c.c_customer_sk = cp.ss_customer_sk
ORDER BY cp.total_net_profit DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
SELECT 
    c.c_customer_id, 
    c.c_first_name, 
    c.c_last_name, 
    d.d_date, 
    SUM(ss.ss_net_profit) AS total_net_profit 
FROM 
    store_sales ss 
JOIN 
    customer c ON ss.ss_customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk 
JOIN 
    date_dim d ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk 
WHERE 
    d.d_year = 2023 
GROUP BY 
    c.c_customer_id, 
    c.c_first_name, 
    c.c_last_name, 
    d.d_date 
ORDER BY 
    total_net_profit DESC 
LIMIT 100;
sql2:
WITH filtered_dates AS (
    SELECT d_date_sk, d_date
    FROM date_dim
    WHERE d_year = 2023
),
customer_daily_profit AS (
    SELECT
        ss.ss_customer_sk,
        fd.d_date,
        SUM(ss.ss_net_profit) AS total_net_profit
    FROM store_sales ss
    INNER JOIN filtered_dates fd ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = fd.d_date_sk
    GROUP BY ss.ss_customer_sk, fd.d_date
)
SELECT
    c.c_customer_id,
    c.c_first_name,
    c.c_last_name,
    cdp.d_date,
    cdp.total_net_profit
FROM customer_daily_profit cdp
JOIN customer c ON cdp.ss_customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk
ORDER BY total_net_profit DESC
LIMIT 100;

sql1:
SELECT 
    c.c_customer_id, 
    ca.ca_city, 
    SUM(ss.ss_net_profit) AS total_net_profit 
FROM 
    customer AS c 
JOIN 
    customer_address AS ca ON c.c_current_addr_sk = ca.ca_address_sk 
JOIN 
    store_sales AS ss ON ss.ss_customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk 
WHERE 
    ca.ca_state = 'CA' 
GROUP BY 
    c.c_customer_id, ca.ca_city 
ORDER BY 
    total_net_profit DESC 
LIMIT 100;
sql2:
WITH ca_customers AS (
    SELECT c.c_customer_sk, c.c_customer_id, ca.ca_city
    FROM customer AS c
    JOIN customer_address AS ca
      ON c.c_current_addr_sk = ca.ca_address_sk
     AND ca.ca_state = 'CA'
)
SELECT 
    cc.c_customer_id,
    cc.ca_city,
    SUM(ss.ss_net_profit) AS total_net_profit
FROM 
    store_sales AS ss
JOIN 
    ca_customers AS cc ON ss.ss_customer_sk = cc.c_customer_sk
GROUP BY 
    cc.c_customer_id, cc.ca_city
ORDER BY 
    total_net_profit DESC
LIMIT 100;

    c.c_customer_id,
    ca.ca_city,
    COUNT(ss.ss_ticket_number) AS total_sales,

    customer c

    date_dim d ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk AND d.d_year = 2023

INNER JOIN ws_filtered ws ON c.c_customer_sk = ws.ws_bill_customer_sk

SELECT 
    c.c_customer_sk, 
    c.c_first_name, 
    c.c_last_name, 
    ca.ca_city, 
    SUM(ss.ss_quantity) AS total_quantity_sold, 
    SUM(ss.ss_sales_price) AS total_sales

    customer c

    customer_address ca ON c.c_current_addr_sk = ca.ca_address_sk
JOIN 
    store_sales ss ON c.c_customer_sk = ss.ss_customer_sk

    ca.ca_state = 'CA' 
    AND ss.ss_sold_date_sk BETWEEN 2459215 AND 2459215 + 30
GROUP BY

ss_filtered AS (

    c.c_last_name,
    SUM(ss.ss_sales_price) AS total_sales,
    COUNT(ss.ss_ticket_number) AS total_transactions

    store_sales AS ss ON c.c_customer_sk = ss.ss_customer_sk

           ss_sales_price,

      AND ss_sold_time_sk IN (SELECT t_time_sk FROM time_dim)
)

       c.c_last_name,

sql1:
SELECT 
    ca_state,
    COUNT(DISTINCT c_customer_sk) AS total_customers,
    COUNT(DISTINCT sr_item_sk) AS total_returns,
    SUM(sr_return_amt) AS total_return_amount
FROM 
    customer_address
JOIN 
    customer ON ca_address_sk = c_current_addr_sk
LEFT JOIN 
    store_returns ON c_customer_sk = sr_customer_sk
GROUP BY 
    ca_state
ORDER BY 
    total_return_amount DESC
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH cust_addr AS (
    SELECT c_customer_sk, ca_state
    FROM customer
    JOIN customer_address ON c_current_addr_sk = ca_address_sk
),
cust_returns AS (
    SELECT sr_customer_sk, sr_item_sk, sr_return_amt
    FROM store_returns
)
SELECT
    ca.ca_state,
    COUNT(DISTINCT ca.c_customer_sk) AS total_customers,
    COUNT(DISTINCT cr.sr_item_sk) AS total_returns,
    SUM(cr.sr_return_amt) AS total_return_amount
FROM
    cust_addr ca
LEFT JOIN
    cust_returns cr ON ca.c_customer_sk = cr.sr_customer_sk
GROUP BY
    ca.ca_state
ORDER BY
    total_return_amount DESC
LIMIT 10

    SUM(ss.ss_sales_price) AS total_sales,
    COUNT(DISTINCT ss.ss_ticket_number) AS transaction_count,
    AVG(ss.ss_net_profit) AS avg_net_profit
FROM
    customer AS c
JOIN
    store_sales AS ss ON c.c_customer_sk = ss.ss_customer_sk
JOIN
    date_dim AS d ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
WHERE
    d.d_year = 2023
GROUP BY
    c.c_customer_id
ORDER BY
    total_sales DESC
LIMIT 100;
sql2:
WITH sales_2023 AS (
    SELECT
        ss.ss_customer_sk,
        SUM(ss.ss_sales_price) AS total_sales,
        COUNT(DISTINCT ss.ss_ticket_number) AS transaction_count,
        AVG(ss.ss_net_profit) AS avg_net_profit
    FROM
        store_sales AS ss
    WHERE
        EXISTS (
            SELECT 1
            FROM date_dim AS d
            WHERE d.d_date_sk = ss.ss_sold_date_sk
              AND d.d_year = 2023
        )
    GROUP BY
        ss.ss_customer_sk
)
SELECT
    c.c_customer_id,
    s.total_sales,
    s.transaction_count,
    s.avg_net_profit
FROM
    customer AS c
JOIN
    sales_2023 AS s ON c.c_customer_sk = s.ss_customer_sk
ORDER BY
    s.total_sales DESC
LIMIT 100;

SELECT

    SUM(ws_sales_price) AS total_revenue,
    AVG(ws_sales_price) AS average_sales_price,
    ws_ship_mode_sk,
    d_year
FROM

LIMIT 10;

    SELECT ws_sales_price,
           ws_ship_mode_sk,
           (SELECT d_year FROM date_dim WHERE d_date_sk = ws_sold_date_sk) AS d_year
    FROM web_sales
    WHERE ws_sold_date_sk IN (SELECT d_date_sk FROM date_dim)
)

    COUNT(*) AS total_sales,
    SUM(ws_sales_price) AS total_revenue,
    AVG(ws_sales_price) AS average_sales_price,
    ws_ship_mode_sk,
    d_year
FROM sales_with_year
GROUP BY ws_ship_mode_sk, d_year
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
SELECT 
    ca.ca_city,
    COUNT(DISTINCT c.c_customer_sk) AS total_customers,
    SUM(ss.ss_quantity) AS total_sales_quantity,
    SUM(ss.ss_net_paid) AS total_net_sales
FROM 
    customer c
JOIN 
    customer_address ca ON c.c_current_addr_sk = ca.ca_address_sk
JOIN 
    store_sales ss ON c.c_customer_sk = ss.ss_customer_sk
WHERE 
    ca.ca_state = 'CA' 
    AND ss.ss_sold_date_sk BETWEEN 2459475 AND 2459480
GROUP BY 
    ca.ca_city
ORDER BY 
    total_net_sales DESC
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH ca_customers AS (
    SELECT c.c_customer_sk, ca.ca_city
    FROM customer c
    JOIN customer_address ca ON c.c_current_addr_sk = ca.ca_address_sk
    WHERE ca.ca_state = 'CA'
),
filtered_sales AS (
    SELECT ss.ss_customer_sk, ss.ss_quantity, ss.ss_net_paid
    FROM store_sales ss
    WHERE ss.ss_sold_date_sk BETWEEN 2459475 AND 2459480
      AND EXISTS (
          SELECT 1 FROM customer c
          JOIN customer_address ca ON c.c_current_addr_sk = ca.ca_address_sk
          WHERE ca.ca_state = 'CA' AND c.c_customer_sk = ss.ss_customer_sk
      )
)
SELECT
    cc.ca_city,
    COUNT(DISTINCT cc.c_customer_sk) AS total_customers,
    SUM(fs.ss_quantity) AS total_sales_quantity,
    SUM(fs.ss_net_paid) AS total_net_sales
FROM
    ca_customers cc
JOIN
    filtered_sales fs ON cc.c_customer_sk = fs.ss_customer_sk
GROUP BY
    cc.ca_city
ORDER BY
    total_net_sales DESC
LIMIT 10;

    customer C

    customer_address CA ON C.c_current_addr_sk = CA.ca_address_sk

    store_sales SS ON C.c_customer_sk = SS.ss_customer_sk
JOIN 
    date_dim D ON SS.ss_sold_date_sk = D.d_date_sk

    total_sales DESC

sql1:
SELECT
    c.c_customer_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT ss.ss_ticket_number) AS total_store_sales,
    SUM(ss.ss_sales_price) AS total_sales_value,
    SUM(ss.ss_net_profit) AS total_net_profit,
    d.d_year
FROM
    customer c
JOIN
    store_sales ss ON c.c_customer_sk = ss.ss_customer_sk
JOIN
    date_dim d ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
WHERE
    d.d_year BETWEEN 2020 AND 2023
GROUP BY
    c.c_customer_id, d.d_year
ORDER BY
    c.c_customer_id, d.d_year;
sql2:
WITH sales_agg AS (
    SELECT
        ss.ss_customer_sk,
        d.d_year,
        COUNT(DISTINCT ss.ss_ticket_number) AS total_store_sales,
        SUM(ss.ss_sales_price) AS total_sales_value,
        SUM(ss.ss_net_profit) AS total_net_profit
    FROM
        store_sales ss,
        date_dim d
    WHERE
        ss.ss_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
        AND d.d_year BETWEEN 2020 AND 2023
    GROUP BY
        ss.ss_customer_sk, d.d_year
)
SELECT
    c.c_customer_id,
    sa.total_store_sales,
    sa.total_sales_value,
    sa.total_net_profit,
    sa.d_year
FROM
    customer c
JOIN
    sales_agg sa ON c.c_customer_sk = sa.ss_customer_sk
ORDER BY
    c.c_customer_id, sa.d_year;

SELECT 
    c.c_customer_id,
    c.c_first_name,
    c.c_last_name,
    ca.ca_city,
    COUNT(DISTINCT ss.ss_ticket_number) AS total_purchases,
    SUM(ss.ss_ext_sales_price) AS total_spent
FROM 
    customer c
JOIN 
    customer_address ca ON c.c_current_addr_sk = ca.ca_address_sk
JOIN 
    store_sales ss ON c.c_customer_sk = ss.ss_customer_sk
WHERE 
    ca.ca_state = 'CA'
    AND ss.ss_sold_date_sk >= 2450000 
    AND ss.ss_sold_date_sk <= 2450005 
GROUP BY 
    c.c_customer_id, c.c_first_name, c.c_last_name, ca.ca_city
ORDER BY 
    total_spent DESC
LIMIT 100;
sql2:

    SELECT ca_address_sk, ca_city
    FROM customer_address
    WHERE ca_state = 'CA'
),
ss_filtered AS (
    SELECT ss_customer_sk, ss_ticket_number, ss_ext_sales_price
    FROM store_sales
    WHERE ss_sold_date_sk >= 2450000 AND ss_sold_date_sk <= 2450005
)
SELECT
    c.c_customer_id,
    c.c_first_name,
    c.c_last_name,
    cf.ca_city,
    COUNT(DISTINCT sf.ss_ticket_number) AS total_purchases,
    SUM(sf.ss_ext_sales_price) AS total_spent
FROM
    customer c
JOIN
    ca_filtered cf ON c.c_current_addr_sk = cf.ca_address_sk
JOIN
    ss_filtered sf ON c.c_customer_sk = sf.ss_customer_sk
GROUP BY
    c.c_customer_id, c.c_first_name, c.c_last_name, cf.ca_city
ORDER BY
    total_spent DESC
LIMIT 100;

sql1:
SELECT 
    c.c_customer_id,
    SUM(ss.ss_sales_price) AS total_sales,
    COUNT(ss.ss_ticket_number) AS number_of_sales,
    DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(ss.ss_sales_price) DESC) AS sales_rank
FROM 
    customer AS c
JOIN 
    store_sales AS ss ON c.c_customer_sk = ss.ss_customer_sk
JOIN 
    date_dim AS d ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
WHERE 
    d.d_year = 2023
GROUP BY 
    c.c_customer_id
HAVING 
    SUM(ss.ss_sales_price) > 1000
ORDER BY 
    total_sales DESC
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH customer_totals AS (
    SELECT
        c.c_customer_id,
        SUM(ss.ss_sales_price) AS total_sales,
        COUNT(ss.ss_ticket_number) AS number_of_sales
    FROM
        customer AS c
    JOIN
        store_sales AS ss ON c.c_customer_sk = ss.ss_customer_sk
    JOIN
        date_dim AS d ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
    WHERE
        d.d_year = 2023
    GROUP BY
        c.c_customer_id
)
SELECT
    c_customer_id,
    total_sales,
    number_of_sales,
    DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY total_sales DESC) AS sales_rank
FROM
    customer_totals
WHERE
    total_sales > 1000
ORDER BY
    total_sales DESC
LIMIT 10;

    customer_address ca ON c.c_current_addr_sk = ca.ca_address_sk
JOIN 
    store_sales ss ON c.c_customer_sk = ss.ss_customer_sk
WHERE 
    ca.ca_state = 'CA' 
    AND ss.ss_sold_date_sk BETWEEN 10000 AND 20000
GROUP BY 
    c.c_customer_id, 
    c.c_first_name, 
    c.c_last_name, 
    ca.ca_city, 
    ca.ca_state
ORDER BY 
    total_sales DESC
LIMIT 100;
sql2:
WITH ca_filtered AS (
    SELECT ca_address_sk, ca_city, ca_state
    FROM customer_address
    WHERE ca_state = 'CA'
),
ss_filtered AS (
    SELECT ss_customer_sk, ss_sales_price
    FROM store_sales
    WHERE ss_sold_date_sk BETWEEN 10000 AND 20000
),
customer_sales AS (
    SELECT
        c.c_customer_id,
        c.c_first_name,
        c.c_last_name,
        ca.ca_city,
        ca.ca_state,
        sf.ss_sales_price
    FROM customer c
    INNER JOIN ca_filtered ca ON c.c_current_addr_sk = ca.ca_address_sk
    INNER JOIN ss_filtered sf ON c.c_customer_sk = sf.ss_customer_sk
)
SELECT
    c_customer_id,
    c_first_name,
    c_last_name,
    ca_city,
    ca_state,
    SUM(ss_sales_price) AS total_sales
FROM customer_sales
GROUP BY
    c_customer_id,
    c_first_name,
    c_last_name,
    ca_city,
    ca_state
ORDER BY
    total_sales DESC
LIMIT 100;

sql1:
SELECT 
    ca_state,
    COUNT(DISTINCT c_customer_sk) AS num_customers,
    AVG(cd_purchase_estimate) AS avg_purchase_estimate,
    SUM(ws_net_profit) AS total_net_profit
FROM 
    customer_address
JOIN 
    customer ON ca_address_sk = c_current_addr_sk
JOIN 
    customer_demographics ON c_current_cdemo_sk = cd_demo_sk
JOIN 
    web_sales ON c_customer_sk = ws_bill_customer_sk
GROUP BY 
    ca_state
ORDER BY 
    total_net_profit DESC
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH cust_ws AS (
    SELECT
        c.c_customer_sk,
        c.c_current_addr_sk,
        c.c_current_cdemo_sk,
        ws.ws_net_profit
    FROM
        customer c
    INNER JOIN web_sales ws ON c.c_customer_sk = ws.ws_bill_customer_sk
),
base AS (
    SELECT
        ca.ca_state,
        cw.c_customer_sk,
        cd.cd_purchase_estimate,
        cw.ws_net_profit
    FROM
        cust_ws cw
    INNER JOIN customer_address ca ON cw.c_current_addr_sk = ca.ca_address_sk
    INNER JOIN customer_demographics cd ON cw.c_current_cdemo_sk = cd.cd_demo_sk
)
SELECT
    ca_state,
    COUNT(DISTINCT c_customer_sk) AS num_customers,
    AVG(cd_purchase_estimate) AS avg_purchase_estimate,
    SUM(ws_net_profit) AS total_net_profit
FROM
    base
GROUP BY
    ca_state
ORDER BY
    total_net_profit DESC
LIMIT 10;

    web_sales ws ON c.c_customer_sk = ws.ws_bill_customer_sk
JOIN 
    date_dim d ON ws.ws_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
WHERE 
    d.d_year = 2023
GROUP BY 
    c.c_customer_id
ORDER BY 
    total_sales DESC
LIMIT 100;
sql2:
WITH customer_web_sales AS (
    SELECT
        ws.ws_bill_customer_sk,
        ws.ws_sales_price,
        ws.ws_order_number
    FROM
        web_sales ws
    WHERE
        EXISTS (
            SELECT 1
            FROM date_dim d
            WHERE d.d_date_sk = ws.ws_sold_date_sk
              AND d.d_year = 2023
        )
)
SELECT
    c.c_customer_id,
    SUM(cws.ws_sales_price) AS total_sales,
    COUNT(cws.ws_order_number) AS order_count,
    AVG(cws.ws_sales_price) AS avg_order_value
FROM
    customer c
JOIN
    customer_web_sales cws ON c.c_customer_sk = cws.ws_bill_customer_sk
GROUP BY
    c.c_customer_id
ORDER BY
    total_sales DESC
LIMIT 100;

    SUM(ss.ss_sales_price) AS total_sales,
    COUNT(DISTINCT ss.ss_ticket_number) AS number_of_transactions,
    ca.ca_city,
    ca.ca_state
FROM 
    customer c
JOIN 
    store_sales ss ON c.c_customer_sk = ss.ss_customer_sk
JOIN 
    customer_address ca ON c.c_current_addr_sk = ca.ca_address_sk
WHERE 
    ca.ca_state = 'CA' AND 
    ss.ss_sold_date_sk BETWEEN 2450000 AND 2450600
GROUP BY 
    c.c_customer_id, ca.ca_city, ca.ca_state
ORDER BY 
    total_sales DESC
LIMIT 100;

sql1:
SELECT 
    ca_state, 
    COUNT(DISTINCT c_customer_id) AS customer_count, 
    SUM(ss_net_profit) AS total_net_profit 
FROM 
    customer_address 
JOIN 
    customer ON customer.c_current_addr_sk = customer_address.ca_address_sk 
JOIN 
    store_sales ON store_sales.ss_customer_sk = customer.c_customer_sk 
JOIN 
    date_dim ON date_dim.d_date_sk = store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk 
WHERE 
    date_dim.d_year = 2023 
GROUP BY 
    ca_state 
ORDER BY 
    total_net_profit DESC 
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH sales_2023 AS (
    SELECT ss_customer_sk, ss_net_profit
    FROM store_sales
    WHERE EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM date_dim
        WHERE d_date_sk = ss_sold_date_sk AND d_year = 2023
    )
)
SELECT
    ca_state,
    COUNT(DISTINCT c_customer_id) AS customer_count,
    SUM(s.ss_net_profit) AS total_net_profit
FROM
    sales_2023 s
    JOIN customer c ON c.c_customer_sk = s.ss_customer_sk
    JOIN customer_address ca ON ca.ca_address_sk = c.c_current_addr_sk
GROUP BY
    ca_state
ORDER BY
    total_net_profit DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
SELECT 
    COUNT(*) AS total_sales,
    SUM(ss_net_profit) AS total_net_profit,
    AVG(ss_sales_price) AS average_sales_price,
    MAX(ss_net_paid) AS max_net_paid,
    MIN(ss_net_paid) AS min_net_paid
FROM 
    store_sales
WHERE 
    ss_sold_date_sk BETWEEN 1000 AND 2000
GROUP BY 
    ss_store_sk
ORDER BY 
    total_net_profit DESC
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH filtered_sales AS (
    SELECT ss_store_sk,
           ss_net_profit,
           ss_sales_price,
           ss_net_paid
    FROM store_sales
    WHERE ss_sold_date_sk >= 1000
      AND ss_sold_date_sk <= 2000
)
SELECT 
    COUNT(*) AS total_sales,
    SUM(ss_net_profit) AS total_net_profit,
    AVG(ss_sales_price) AS average_sales_price,
    MAX(ss_net_paid) AS max_net_paid,
    MIN(ss_net_paid) AS min_net_paid
FROM filtered_sales
GROUP BY ss_store_sk
ORDER BY total_net_profit DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
SELECT 
    c.c_customer_id, 
    s.s_store_name, 
    SUM(ss.ss_quantity) AS total_quantity_sold, 
    SUM(ss.ss_sales_price) AS total_sales 
FROM 
    customer c 
JOIN 
    store_sales ss ON c.c_customer_sk = ss.ss_customer_sk 
JOIN 
    store s ON ss.ss_store_sk = s.s_store_sk 
WHERE 
    c.c_birth_year BETWEEN 1980 AND 1990 
GROUP BY 
    c.c_customer_id, s.s_store_name 
ORDER BY 
    total_sales DESC 
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH filtered_customers AS (
    SELECT c_customer_sk, c_customer_id
    FROM customer
    WHERE c_birth_year BETWEEN 1980 AND 1990
),
sales_agg AS (
    SELECT ss.ss_customer_sk, ss.ss_store_sk,
           SUM(ss.ss_quantity) AS total_quantity_sold,
           SUM(ss.ss_sales_price) AS total_sales
    FROM store_sales ss
    WHERE EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM filtered_customers fc
        WHERE fc.c_customer_sk = ss.ss_customer_sk
    )
    GROUP BY ss.ss_customer_sk, ss.ss_store_sk
)
SELECT fc.c_customer_id,
       s.s_store_name,
       sa.total_quantity_sold,
       sa.total_sales
FROM sales_agg sa
JOIN filtered_customers fc ON fc.c_customer_sk = sa.ss_customer_sk
JOIN store s ON sa.ss_store_sk = s.s_store_sk
ORDER BY sa.total_sales DESC
LIMIT 10;

        COUNT(DISTINCT ss.ss_customer_sk) AS unique_customers,
        SUM(ss.ss_quantity) AS total_quantity
    FROM

SELECT 
    ca_state,
    COUNT(DISTINCT c_customer_sk) AS customer_count,
    SUM(ws_sales_price) AS total_sales,
    AVG(cd_purchase_estimate) AS average_purchase_estimate
FROM 
    customer_address ca
JOIN 
    customer c ON ca.ca_address_sk = c.c_current_addr_sk
JOIN 
    web_sales ws ON c.c_customer_sk = ws.ws_bill_customer_sk
JOIN 
    customer_demographics cd ON c.c_current_cdemo_sk = cd.cd_demo_sk
WHERE 
    ca_state IN ('CA', 'TX', 'NY')
GROUP BY 
    ca_state
ORDER BY 
    customer_count DESC;
sql2:
WITH cust_demo AS (
    SELECT c.c_customer_sk,
           c.c_current_addr_sk,
           cd.cd_purchase_estimate
    FROM customer c
    INNER JOIN customer_demographics cd
            ON c.c_current_cdemo_sk = cd.cd_demo_sk
),
cust_sales AS (
    SELECT ws.ws_bill_customer_sk,
           ws.ws_sales_price
    FROM web_sales ws
    WHERE EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM cust_demo cd2
        WHERE cd2.c_customer_sk = ws.ws_bill_customer_sk
    )
)
SELECT ca.ca_state,
       COUNT(DISTINCT cd.c_customer_sk) AS customer_count,
       SUM(cs.ws_sales_price) AS total_sales,
       AVG(cd.cd_purchase_estimate) AS average_purchase_estimate
FROM customer_address ca
JOIN cust_demo cd
  ON ca.ca_address_sk = cd.c_current_addr_sk
JOIN cust_sales cs
  ON cd.c_customer_sk = cs.ws_bill_customer_sk
WHERE ca.ca_state IN ('CA', 'TX', 'NY')
GROUP BY ca.ca_state
ORDER BY customer_count DESC;

sql1:
SELECT
    SUM(ss_ext_sales_price) AS total_sales,
    COUNT(DISTINCT ss_customer_sk) AS unique_customers,
    AVG(ss_net_profit) AS average_profit
FROM
    store_sales
WHERE
    ss_sold_date_sk BETWEEN 1 AND 1000
GROUP BY
    ss_store_sk
ORDER BY
    total_sales DESC
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH store_agg AS (
    SELECT
        ss_store_sk,
        SUM(ss_ext_sales_price) AS total_sales,
        COUNT(DISTINCT ss_customer_sk) AS unique_customers,
        AVG(ss_net_profit) AS average_profit
    FROM
        store_sales
        INNER JOIN date_dim ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
    WHERE
        d_date_sk >= 1 AND d_date_sk <= 1000
    GROUP BY
        ss_store_sk
)
SELECT
    total_sales,
    unique_customers,
    average_profit
FROM
    store_agg
ORDER BY
    total_sales DESC
LIMIT 10

sql1:
SELECT 
    c.c_customer_id,
    ca.ca_city,
    SUM(ss.ss_sales_price) AS total_sales
FROM 
    customer AS c
JOIN 
    customer_address AS ca ON c.c_current_addr_sk = ca.ca_address_sk
JOIN 
    store_sales AS ss ON c.c_customer_sk = ss.ss_customer_sk
GROUP BY 
    c.c_customer_id, ca.ca_city
ORDER BY 
    total_sales DESC
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
SELECT
    c.c_customer_id,
    ca.ca_city,
    s.total_sales
FROM
    customer AS c
JOIN
    customer_address AS ca ON c.c_current_addr_sk = ca.ca_address_sk
JOIN
    (SELECT ss_customer_sk, SUM(ss_sales_price) AS total_sales
     FROM store_sales
     GROUP BY ss_customer_sk) AS s ON c.c_customer_sk = s.ss_customer_sk
GROUP BY
    c.c_customer_id, ca.ca_city, s.total_sales
ORDER BY
    total_sales DESC
LIMIT 10;

SELECT

    c.c_last_name,
    ca.ca_city,
    ca.ca_state,
    SUM(ss.ss_quantity) AS total_quantity_sold
FROM 
    customer c
JOIN 
    customer_address ca ON c.c_current_addr_sk = ca.ca_address_sk
JOIN 
    store_sales ss ON c.c_customer_sk = ss.ss_customer_sk
GROUP BY 
    c.c_first_name, 
    c.c_last_name, 
    ca.ca_city, 
    ca.ca_state
ORDER BY 
    total_quantity_sold DESC
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH cust_sales AS (
    SELECT
        ss.ss_customer_sk,
        SUM(ss.ss_quantity) AS total_quantity_sold
    FROM
        store_sales ss
    GROUP BY
        ss.ss_customer_sk
)
SELECT
    c.c_first_name,
    c.c_last_name,
    ca.ca_city,
    ca.ca_state,
    cs.total_quantity_sold
FROM
    customer c
JOIN
    customer_address ca ON c.c_current_addr_sk = ca.ca_address_sk
JOIN
    cust_sales cs ON c.c_customer_sk = cs.ss_customer_sk
ORDER BY
    total_quantity_sold DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
SELECT ca_city, COUNT(DISTINCT c_customer_id) AS number_of_customers
FROM customer_address ca
JOIN customer c ON ca.ca_address_sk = c.c_current_addr_sk
GROUP BY ca_city
ORDER BY number_of_customers DESC
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
SELECT ca_city, number_of_customers
FROM (
    SELECT ca.ca_city,
           COUNT(DISTINCT c.c_customer_id) AS number_of_customers,
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT c.c_customer_id) DESC) AS rn
    FROM customer c
    INNER JOIN customer_address ca ON c.c_current_addr_sk = ca.ca_address_sk
    GROUP BY ca.ca_city
) sub
WHERE rn <= 10
ORDER BY number_of_customers DESC;

sql2:
SELECT ca.ca_state, SUM(c_agg.cnt) AS customer_count
FROM customer_address ca
JOIN (
    SELECT c_current_addr_sk, COUNT(c_customer_sk) AS cnt
    FROM customer
    GROUP BY c_current_addr_sk
) c_agg ON c_agg.c_current_addr_sk = ca.ca_address_sk
GROUP BY ca.ca_state
ORDER BY customer_count DESC;

sql2:

    SELECT
        ca_city,
        COUNT(DISTINCT c_customer_sk) AS num_customers
    FROM
        customer_address
    WHERE
        EXISTS (
            SELECT 1
            FROM customer
            WHERE c_current_addr_sk = ca_address_sk
        )
    GROUP BY
        ca_city
)
SELECT
    ca_city,
    (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT c.c_customer_sk)
     FROM customer c
     WHERE c.c_current_addr_sk IN (
         SELECT ca.ca_address_sk FROM customer_address ca WHERE ca.ca_city = city_counts.ca_city
     )) AS num_customers
FROM
    city_counts
ORDER BY
    num_customers DESC
LIMIT 10;

SELECT
    c.c_customer_id,
    c.c_first_name,
    c.c_last_name,
    a.ca_city,
    a.ca_state,
    cs.total_sales
FROM
    customer c
JOIN
    customer_address a ON c.c_current_addr_sk = a.ca_address_sk
JOIN
    customer_sales cs ON c.c_customer_sk = cs.ss_customer_sk
ORDER BY
    cs.total_sales DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
WITH RecursiveSales AS (
    SELECT
        ws_item_sk,
        SUM(ws_quantity) AS total_quantity,
        SUM(ws_net_profit) AS total_net_profit,
        SUM(ws_ext_sales_price) AS total_sales
    FROM web_sales
    WHERE ws_sold_date_sk BETWEEN 1 AND 1000
    GROUP BY ws_item_sk
),
CustomerInfo AS (
    SELECT
        c.c_customer_sk,
        c.c_first_name,
        c.c_last_name,
        cd.cd_gender,
        cd.cd_marital_status,
        COALESCE(hd.hd_income_band_sk, ib.ib_income_band_sk) AS income_band_sk,
        CASE
            WHEN cd.cd_dep_count IS NULL THEN 'No Dependents'
            ELSE 'Has Dependents'
        END AS dependent_status
    FROM customer c
    LEFT JOIN customer_demographics cd ON c.c_current_cdemo_sk = cd.cd_demo_sk
    LEFT JOIN household_demographics hd ON c.c_current_hdemo_sk = hd.hd_demo_sk
    LEFT JOIN income_band ib ON hd.hd_income_band_sk = ib.ib_income_band_sk
),
HighValueReturns AS (
    SELECT
        cr_item_sk,
        SUM(cr_return_quantity) AS total_returned_quantity,
        SUM(cr_return_amount) AS total_return_amount
    FROM catalog_returns
    WHERE cr_return_amount > 100
    GROUP BY cr_item_sk
)
SELECT
    ci.c_first_name || ' ' || ci.c_last_name AS customer_name,
    CASE WHEN ci.cd_gender = 'M' THEN 'Mr.' ELSE 'Ms.' END AS salutation,
    COALESCE(rs.total_quantity, 0) AS total_sales_quantity,
    COALESCE(rs.total_net_profit, 0) AS total_net_profit,
    COALESCE(hv.total_returned_quantity, 0) AS total_returned_quantity,
    COALESCE(hv.total_return_amount, 0) AS total_return_amount,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ci.income_band_sk ORDER BY COALESCE(rs.total_net_profit, 0) DESC) AS profit_rank
FROM CustomerInfo ci
LEFT JOIN RecursiveSales rs ON ci.c_customer_sk = rs.ws_item_sk
LEFT JOIN HighValueReturns hv ON rs.ws_item_sk = hv.cr_item_sk
WHERE ci.dependent_status = 'Has Dependents'
AND (ci.income_band_sk IS NOT NULL OR ci.income_band_sk IS NULL)
ORDER BY profit_rank ASC, total_net_profit DESC
LIMIT 100
OFFSET (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CustomerInfo) / 2;
sql2:
SELECT
    c.c_first_name || ' ' || c.c_last_name AS customer_name,
    CASE WHEN cd.cd_gender = 'M' THEN 'Mr.' ELSE 'Ms.' END AS salutation,
    COALESCE(rs.total_quantity, 0) AS total_sales_quantity,
    COALESCE(rs.total_net_profit, 0) AS total_net_profit,
    COALESCE(hv.total_returned_quantity, 0) AS total_returned_quantity,
    COALESCE(hv.total_return_amount, 0) AS total_return_amount,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
        PARTITION BY COALESCE(hd.hd_income_band_sk, ib.ib_income_band_sk)
        ORDER BY COALESCE(rs.total_net_profit, 0) DESC
    ) AS profit_rank
FROM customer c
LEFT JOIN customer_demographics cd ON c.c_current_cdemo_sk = cd.cd_demo_sk
LEFT JOIN household_demographics hd ON c.c_current_hdemo_sk = hd.hd_demo_sk
LEFT JOIN income_band ib ON hd.hd_income_band_sk = ib.ib_income_band_sk
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
        ws_item_sk,
        SUM(ws_quantity) AS total_quantity,
        SUM(ws_net_profit) AS total_net_profit,
        SUM(ws_ext_sales_price) AS total_sales
    FROM web_sales
    WHERE ws_sold_date_sk BETWEEN 1 AND 1000
    GROUP BY ws_item_sk
) rs ON c.c_customer_sk = rs.ws_item_sk
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
        cr_item_sk,
        SUM(cr_return_quantity) AS total_returned_quantity,
        SUM(cr_return_amount) AS total_return_amount
    FROM catalog_returns
    WHERE cr_return_amount > 100
    GROUP BY cr_item_sk
) hv ON rs.ws_item_sk = hv.cr_item_sk
WHERE cd.cd_dep_count IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY profit_rank ASC, total_net_profit DESC
LIMIT 100
OFFSET (
    SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customer c2
    LEFT JOIN customer_demographics cd2 ON c2.c_current_cdemo_sk = cd2.cd_demo_sk
    LEFT JOIN household_demographics hd2 ON c2.c_current_hdemo_sk = hd2.hd_demo_sk
    LEFT JOIN income_band ib2 ON hd2.hd_income_band_sk = ib2.ib_income_band_sk
) / 2;

sql1:
WITH ranked_customers AS (
    SELECT 
        c.c_customer_sk,
        c.c_first_name,
        c.c_last_name,
        cd.cd_gender,
        cd.cd_marital_status,
        cd.cd_purchase_estimate,
        RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY cd.cd_gender ORDER BY cd.cd_purchase_estimate DESC) AS gender_rank
    FROM 
        customer c
    JOIN 
        customer_demographics cd ON c.c_current_cdemo_sk = cd.cd_demo_sk
    WHERE 
        cd.cd_marital_status IN ('M', 'S')
),
returns_summary AS (
    SELECT 
        sr_customer_sk,
        SUM(sr_return_quantity) AS total_return_quantity,
        SUM(sr_net_loss) AS total_net_loss
    FROM 
        store_returns
    WHERE 
        sr_return_quantity IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY 
        sr_customer_sk
),
web_sales_summary AS (
    SELECT 
        ws_bill_customer_sk,
        SUM(ws_net_profit) AS total_web_profit,
        COUNT(DISTINCT ws_order_number) AS total_orders
    FROM 
        web_sales
    WHERE 
        ws_net_profit > 0
    GROUP BY 
        ws_bill_customer_sk
)
SELECT 
    rc.c_first_name,
    rc.c_last_name,
    rc.cd_gender,
    ws.total_web_profit,
    rs.total_return_quantity,
    rs.total_net_loss,
    CASE 
        WHEN ws.total_web_profit > 1000 THEN 'High Value'
        WHEN ws.total_web_profit BETWEEN 500 AND 1000 THEN 'Medium Value'
        ELSE 'Low Value'
    END AS customer_value_category
FROM 
    ranked_customers rc
LEFT JOIN 
    returns_summary rs ON rc.c_customer_sk = rs.sr_customer_sk 
LEFT JOIN 
    web_sales_summary ws ON rc.c_customer_sk = ws.ws_bill_customer_sk
WHERE 
    (rs.total_return_quantity IS NULL OR rs.total_return_quantity < 5)
    AND (rc.gender_rank = 1 OR rc.gender_rank IS NULL)
    AND (rc.cd_purchase_estimate IS NOT NULL OR rc.cd_gender IS NOT NULL)
ORDER BY 
    customer_value_category, rc.c_last_name, rc.c_first_name;
sql2:
SELECT 
    c.c_first_name,
    c.c_last_name,
    cd.cd_gender,
    ws.total_web_profit,
    rs.total_return_quantity,
    rs.total_net_loss,
    CASE 
        WHEN ws.total_web_profit > 1000 THEN 'High Value'
        WHEN ws.total_web_profit BETWEEN 500 AND 1000 THEN 'Medium Value'
        ELSE 'Low Value'
    END AS customer_value_category
FROM 
    customer c
JOIN 
    customer_demographics cd ON c.c_current_cdemo_sk = cd.cd_demo_sk
LEFT JOIN 
    (SELECT 
         sr_customer_sk,
         SUM(sr_return_quantity) AS total_return_quantity,
         SUM(sr_net_loss) AS total_net_loss
     FROM 
         store_returns
     WHERE 
         sr_return_quantity IS NOT NULL
     GROUP BY 
         sr_customer_sk
    ) rs ON c.c_customer_sk = rs.sr_customer_sk
LEFT JOIN 
    (SELECT 
         ws_bill_customer_sk,
         SUM(ws_net_profit) AS total_web_profit,
         COUNT(DISTINCT ws_order_number) AS total_orders
     FROM 
         web_sales
     WHERE 
         ws_net_profit > 0
     GROUP BY 
         ws_bill_customer_sk
    ) ws ON c.c_customer_sk = ws.ws_bill_customer_sk
WHERE 
    (cd.cd_marital_status = 'M' OR cd.cd_marital_status = 'S')
    AND (rs.total_return_quantity IS NULL OR rs.total_return_quantity < 5)
    AND (RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY cd.cd_gender ORDER BY cd.cd_purchase_estimate DESC) = 1
         OR RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY cd.cd_gender ORDER BY cd.cd_purchase_estimate DESC) IS NULL)
    AND (cd.cd_purchase_estimate IS NOT NULL OR cd.cd_gender IS NOT NULL)
ORDER BY 
    customer_value_category, c.c_last_name, c.c_first_name;

sql1:
WITH RankedSales AS (
    SELECT 
        ws_order_number,
        ws_item_sk,
        ws_quantity,
        ws_sales_price,
        ws_net_profit,
        RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY ws_item_sk ORDER BY ws_net_profit DESC) AS rn
    FROM 
        web_sales
    WHERE 
        ws_sales_price > 0 AND ws_quantity IS NOT NULL
),
ReturnStats AS (
    SELECT 
        wr_item_sk,
        SUM(wr_return_quantity) AS total_returned,
        COUNT(wr_order_number) AS return_count,
        COALESCE(SUM(wr_return_quantity), 0) AS valid_return_quantity
    FROM 
        web_returns
    GROUP BY 
        wr_item_sk
),
FinalSales AS (
    SELECT 
        rs.ws_order_number,
        rs.ws_item_sk,
        rs.ws_quantity,
        rs.ws_sales_price,
        COALESCE(rs.ws_net_profit, 0) - COALESCE(r.total_returned, 0) AS net_profit_after_returns
    FROM 
        RankedSales rs
    LEFT JOIN 
        ReturnStats r ON rs.ws_item_sk = r.wr_item_sk
    WHERE 
        rs.rn = 1
)
SELECT 
    fs.ws_order_number,
    fs.ws_item_sk,
    fs.ws_quantity,
    fs.ws_sales_price,
    fs.net_profit_after_returns,
    CASE 
        WHEN fs.net_profit_after_returns > 0 THEN 'Profitable'
        WHEN fs.net_profit_after_returns < 0 THEN 'Loss'
        ELSE 'Break-even' 
    END AS profitability_status,
    CONCAT('Item ID: ', CAST(fs.ws_item_sk AS VARCHAR(255)), ' | Quantity Sold: ', CAST(fs.ws_quantity AS VARCHAR(255))) AS item_summary,
    CASE 
        WHEN fs.ws_quantity = 0 OR fs.ws_sales_price IS NULL THEN NULL
        ELSE ROUND((fs.net_profit_after_returns / fs.ws_quantity), 2) 
    END AS avg_profit_per_item
FROM 
    FinalSales fs
WHERE 
    fs.net_profit_after_returns IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY 
    fs.net_profit_after_returns DESC
LIMIT 100;
sql2:
SELECT 
    ws.ws_order_number,
    ws.ws_item_sk,
    ws.ws_quantity,
    ws.ws_sales_price,
    COALESCE(ws.ws_net_profit, 0) - COALESCE(r.total_returned, 0) AS net_profit_after_returns,
    CASE 
        WHEN COALESCE(ws.ws_net_profit, 0) - COALESCE(r.total_returned, 0) > 0 THEN 'Profitable'
        WHEN COALESCE(ws.ws_net_profit, 0) - COALESCE(r.total_returned, 0) < 0 THEN 'Loss'
        ELSE 'Break-even' 
    END AS profitability_status,
    CONCAT('Item ID: ', CAST(ws.ws_item_sk AS VARCHAR(255)), ' | Quantity Sold: ', CAST(ws.ws_quantity AS VARCHAR(255))) AS item_summary,
    CASE 
        WHEN ws.ws_quantity = 0 OR ws.ws_sales_price IS NULL THEN NULL
        ELSE ROUND((COALESCE(ws.ws_net_profit, 0) - COALESCE(r.total_returned, 0)) / ws.ws_quantity, 2) 
    END AS avg_profit_per_item
FROM 
    web_sales ws
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT 
        ws_item_sk, 
        MAX(ws_net_profit) AS max_net_profit
    FROM 
        web_sales
    WHERE 
        ws_sales_price > 0 AND ws_quantity IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY 
        ws_item_sk
) mx ON ws.ws_item_sk = mx.ws_item_sk AND ws.ws_net_profit = mx.max_net_profit
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT 
        wr_item_sk,
        SUM(wr_return_quantity) AS total_returned,
        COUNT(wr_order_number) AS return_count,
        COALESCE(SUM(wr_return_quantity), 0) AS valid_return_quantity
    FROM 
        web_returns
    GROUP BY 
        wr_item_sk
) r ON ws.ws_item_sk = r.wr_item_sk
WHERE 
    ws.ws_sales_price > 0 
    AND ws.ws_quantity IS NOT NULL
    AND COALESCE(ws.ws_net_profit, 0) - COALESCE(r.total_returned, 0) IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY 
    net_profit_after_returns DESC
LIMIT 100;

sql1:
WITH RankedSales AS (
    SELECT 
        ws.ws_item_sk,
        ws.ws_order_number,
        ws.ws_quantity,
        ws.ws_sales_price,
        ws.ws_net_paid,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ws.ws_item_sk ORDER BY ws.ws_net_paid DESC) AS rn
    FROM 
        web_sales ws
    WHERE 
        ws.ws_sold_date_sk BETWEEN 1000 AND 2000
),
SalesSummary AS (
    SELECT 
        rs.ws_item_sk,
        COUNT(*) AS total_sales,
        SUM(rs.ws_net_paid) AS total_net_paid,
        AVG(rs.ws_sales_price) AS avg_sales_price
    FROM 
        RankedSales rs
    WHERE 
        rs.rn <= 10
    GROUP BY 
        rs.ws_item_sk
),
TopCustomers AS (
    SELECT 
        cs.ss_customer_sk,
        SUM(cs.ss_net_paid) AS cust_spent,
        COUNT(cs.ss_ticket_number) AS purchase_count,
        RANK() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(cs.ss_net_paid) DESC) AS cust_rank
    FROM 
        store_sales cs
    GROUP BY 
        cs.ss_customer_sk
)
SELECT 
    ca.ca_city,
    SUM(ss.total_net_paid) AS total_sales_value,
    COUNT(DISTINCT tc.ss_customer_sk) AS unique_customers,
    MAX(ss.avg_sales_price) AS max_avg_price,
    COALESCE(AVG(ss.total_sales), 0) AS avg_sales_per_item,
    CASE 
        WHEN MAX(ss.total_sales) IS NULL THEN 'No Sales'
        ELSE 'Sales Available'
    END AS sales_status
FROM 
    customer_address ca
LEFT JOIN 
    SalesSummary ss ON ss.ws_item_sk IN (SELECT i.i_item_sk FROM item i WHERE i.i_class_id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT i_class_id FROM item))
JOIN 
    TopCustomers tc ON tc.cust_spent > 1000
WHERE 
    ca.ca_state = 'CA'
GROUP BY 
    ca.ca_city
HAVING 
    SUM(ss.total_net_paid) > 5000
ORDER BY 
    total_sales_value DESC NULLS LAST;
sql2:
SELECT
    ca.ca_city,
    SUM(ss.total_net_paid) AS total_sales_value,
    COUNT(DISTINCT tc.ss_customer_sk) AS unique_customers,
    MAX(ss.avg_sales_price) AS max_avg_price,
    COALESCE(AVG(ss.total_sales), 0) AS avg_sales_per_item,
    CASE
        WHEN MAX(ss.total_sales) IS NULL THEN 'No Sales'
        ELSE 'Sales Available'
    END AS sales_status
FROM
    customer_address ca
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
        rs.ws_item_sk,
        COUNT(*) AS total_sales,
        SUM(rs.ws_net_paid) AS total_net_paid,
        AVG(rs.ws_sales_price) AS avg_sales_price
    FROM (
        SELECT
            ws.ws_item_sk,
            ws.ws_net_paid,
            ws.ws_sales_price,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ws.ws_item_sk ORDER BY ws.ws_net_paid DESC) AS rn
        FROM
            web_sales ws
        WHERE
            ws.ws_sold_date_sk BETWEEN 1000 AND 2000
    ) rs
    WHERE
        rs.rn <= 10
    GROUP BY
        rs.ws_item_sk
) ss ON EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM item i
    WHERE i.i_item_sk = ss.ws_item_sk
      AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM item i2 WHERE i2.i_class_id = i.i_class_id)
)
JOIN (
    SELECT
        cs.ss_customer_sk,
        SUM(cs.ss_net_paid) AS cust_spent,
        COUNT(cs.ss_ticket_number) AS purchase_count,
        RANK() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(cs.ss_net_paid) DESC) AS cust_rank
    FROM
        store_sales cs
    GROUP BY
        cs.ss_customer_sk
) tc ON tc.cust_spent > 1000
WHERE
    ca.ca_state = 'CA'
GROUP BY
    ca.ca_city
HAVING
    SUM(ss.total_net_paid) > 5000
ORDER BY
    total_sales_value DESC NULLS LAST

sql1:
WITH RankedReturns AS (
    SELECT 
        cr_returning_customer_sk,
        COUNT(*) AS return_count,
        SUM(cr_return_amount) AS total_return_amount,
        RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY cr_returning_customer_sk ORDER BY SUM(cr_return_amount) DESC) AS rank_return
    FROM 
        catalog_returns
    WHERE 
        cr_return_quantity > 0 
    GROUP BY 
        cr_returning_customer_sk
),
CustomerInfo AS (
    SELECT 
        c.c_customer_sk,
        c.c_first_name,
        c.c_last_name,
        d.d_date,
        CASE 
            WHEN cd.cd_gender = 'M' THEN 'Male'
            WHEN cd.cd_gender = 'F' THEN 'Female'
            ELSE 'Other' 
        END AS gender,
        cd.cd_marital_status,
        cd.cd_purchase_estimate,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY cd.cd_marital_status ORDER BY cd.cd_purchase_estimate DESC) AS marital_rank
    FROM 
        customer c
    JOIN 
        customer_demographics cd ON c.c_current_cdemo_sk = cd.cd_demo_sk
    JOIN 
        date_dim d ON d.d_date_sk = c.c_first_sales_date_sk
)
SELECT 
    ci.c_first_name,
    ci.c_last_name,
    COALESCE(rr.return_count, 0) AS return_count,
    COALESCE(rr.total_return_amount, 0.00) AS total_return,
    ci.gender,
    ci.cd_marital_status,
    COUNT(ws.ws_order_number) AS total_orders,
    SUM(ws.ws_net_paid) AS total_spent,
    (SUM(ws.ws_net_paid) - COALESCE(rr.total_return_amount, 0)) AS net_spent,
    CASE 
        WHEN SUM(ws.ws_net_paid) IS NULL THEN 'No Orders'
        ELSE 'Has Orders'
    END AS order_status,
    CONCAT(ci.c_first_name, ' ', ci.c_last_name) AS full_name
FROM 
    CustomerInfo ci
LEFT JOIN 
    RankedReturns rr ON ci.c_customer_sk = rr.cr_returning_customer_sk
LEFT JOIN 
    web_sales ws ON ci.c_customer_sk = ws.ws_bill_customer_sk
WHERE 
    (ci.cd_marital_status IN ('S', 'M') AND rr.total_return_amount > 100) 
    OR (ci.gender = 'F' AND ci.marital_rank = 1)
GROUP BY 
    ci.c_first_name, ci.c_last_name, rr.return_count, rr.total_return_amount, 
    ci.gender, ci.cd_marital_status
HAVING 
    SUM(ws.ws_net_paid) IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY 
    net_spent DESC
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
SELECT
    full_q.c_first_name,
    full_q.c_last_name,
    full_q.return_count,
    full_q.total_return,
    full_q.gender,
    full_q.cd_marital_status,
    full_q.total_orders,
    full_q.total_spent,
    full_q.net_spent,
    full_q.order_status,
    full_q.full_name
FROM (
    SELECT
        ci.c_first_name,
        ci.c_last_name,
        COALESCE(rr.return_count, 0) AS return_count,
        COALESCE(rr.total_return_amount, 0.00) AS total_return,
        ci.gender,
        ci.cd_marital_status,
        COUNT(ws.ws_order_number) AS total_orders,
        SUM(ws.ws_net_paid) AS total_spent,
        (SUM(ws.ws_net_paid) - COALESCE(rr.total_return_amount, 0)) AS net_spent,
        CASE
            WHEN SUM(ws.ws_net_paid) IS NULL THEN 'No Orders'
            ELSE 'Has Orders'
        END AS order_status,
        CONCAT(ci.c_first_name, ' ', ci.c_last_name) AS full_name
    FROM (
        SELECT
            c.c_customer_sk,
            c.c_first_name,
            c.c_last_name,
            d.d_date,
            CASE
                WHEN cd.cd_gender = 'M' THEN 'Male'
                WHEN cd.cd_gender = 'F' THEN 'Female'
                ELSE 'Other'
            END AS gender,
            cd.cd_marital_status,
            cd.cd_purchase_estimate,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY cd.cd_marital_status ORDER BY cd.cd_purchase_estimate DESC) AS marital_rank
        FROM
            customer c
        INNER JOIN
            customer_demographics cd ON c.c_current_cdemo_sk = cd.cd_demo_sk
